stories.title: TDD: write SyntheticDataGenerationRunRepositoryTest (3 tests, all red)
accept: Three failing tests: insert round-trip, findLatestBySize returns newest-first, findAll lists all rows
Tests reference SyntheticDataGenerationRun which does not exist yet (compilation failure is acceptable for the red phase)
Test class is in src/test/java and uses the *Test.java naming convention

stories.title: Implement SyntheticDataGenerationRun record + repository + Flyway V1 migration
accept: Java record with all 11 fields from M77 spec (id, size, doctorCount, caseCount, startTime, endTime, totalDurationMs, descriptionMs, embeddingMs, clinicalExperienceMs, graphBuildMs, errorMessage?)
Repository interface + impl with insert, findLatestBySize, findAll methods
Flyway V1 migration adds the table with index on (size, start_time DESC)
M77-01 tests now green

stories.title: Wire run tracking into generateMedicalCaseDescriptions + generateEmbeddings + buildGraph
accept: Repository injected into SyntheticDataPostProcessingServiceImpl
Each phase (descriptions, embeddings, graph) records a SyntheticDataGenerationRun row with the elapsed ms
Test asserts the repo was called with descriptionMs > 0 after the phase runs

stories.title: TDD: write EstimateAdjustmentServiceTest (red)
accept: Test mocks the repository with latest_run = 95s for size=large and asserts the produced CSV row has estimated_time_minutes = 3 (ceil(95/60 * 1.5))
Test compiles against EstimateAdjustmentService which does not exist yet (red phase)
Test uses a temp CSV file for round-trip

stories.title: Implement EstimateAdjustmentService + EstimateAdjustmentProperties + @Scheduled + CSV writer
accept: @ConfigurationProperties(prefix = medexpertmatch.synthetic-data.estimate-adjustment) with enabled, safetyMarginMultiplier (1.5), maxMinutes (60), cron (0 0 3 * * *)
Service reads data-sizes.csv, finds latest run per size, recomputes estimated_time_minutes, writes CSV back atomically
@Scheduled annotation on a new bean, enabled flag respected
M77-04 tests green

stories.title: Wire recentRunsBySize into SyntheticDataGenerationProgressService + controller
accept: DTO gains recentRunsBySize: Map<String, List<RunSummary>>
RunSummary record: (size, startTime, totalDurationMs)
Service loads latest 5 runs per size on every getProgress call
Unit test mocks the new repository and asserts the field is populated

stories.title: TDD: integration test for /state?jobId=... returning run history
accept: IT inserts 2 run rows for size=large via repository, calls GET /api/v1/synthetic-data/state?jobId=... and asserts the response JSON contains recentRunsBySize.large with 2 rows newest-first
Test extends BaseIntegrationTest (Testcontainers Postgres+AGE+PgVector)

stories.title: Template: add 'Last actual' line next to estimate
accept: Template renders a second line under the estimate: 'Last actual: 1 min 35 s' when recentRunsBySize has a row for the current size
Silent (no line) when no runs exist for the size
Existing M77-07 IT still green (template change is additive, no API contract change)

stories.title: mvn verify green (no new failures)
accept: mvn verify exits 0 with all M77 unit + IT tests passing
No regressions in pre-existing 872+ unit tests
No regressions in pre-existing ITs (except the pre-existing Modulith cycle, which is a known issue)

stories.title: Manual smoke: run a generation, observe 'Last actual' updates; wait 24h, observe estimate auto-adjusts
accept: Operator runs a small synthetic-data generation via the admin UI
Immediately after completion, the UI shows 'Last actual: <duration>' below the estimate
After 24h, the nightly @Scheduled job has updated data-sizes.csv's estimated_time_minutes for that size
stories.notes: This is the only non-automated story; the 24h wait is acceptable because M77-09 already proves the logic works on a unit basis.
